hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'self-assessment'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "INFORMATION BARRIER: self-assessment files are write-only records for the orchestrator. Direct reading is blocked to maintain information barriers between Builder and Verifier."}'; elif echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
